Interface PassiveTrigger

All Known Implementing Classes:
FishCastTrigger, FishCatchTrigger
public interface PassiveTrigger
Marker interface for passive ability trigger tokens.

Each skill module defines its own concrete trigger types (e.g. FishCastTrigger, FishCatchTrigger). Trigger tokens serve two purposes: they carry the event context that passives need to act on, and they act as accumulators for aggregated outputs (e.g. a combined timer reduction or XP multiplier) that the skill applies after all passives have fired.

Trigger types must be defined in the owning skill module, not in Sylphian-Skills, because they reference domain classes specific to that module.

Tokens may optionally support debug tracing by overriding record(String, String, boolean) and traceEntries(). Passives call record(String, String, boolean) after contributing to the token; the skill reads traceEntries() after AbstractSkill.firePassives(PassiveTrigger, Player, UUID) returns and forwards the log to any registered debug watcher.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    record(String source, String description)
    Convenience overload for passive contributions; delegates to record(String, String, boolean) with active = false.
    default void
    record(String source, String description, boolean active)
    Records an ability's contribution to this trigger for debug tracing.
    default List<TraceEntry>
    traceEntries()
    Returns all trace entries recorded on this trigger, in the order they were added.

  • Method Details

    • record

      default void record(String source, String description, boolean active)
      Records an ability's contribution to this trigger for debug tracing. No-op by default; override in concrete trigger classes that support tracing.
      Parameters:
      source - display name of the contributing ability
      description - short human-readable description of what the ability did
      active - true if the contribution came from an active ability

    • record

      default void record(String source, String description)
      Convenience overload for passive contributions; delegates to record(String, String, boolean) with active = false.
      Parameters:
      source - display name of the contributing ability
      description - short human-readable description of what the ability did

    • traceEntries

      default List<TraceEntry> traceEntries()
      Returns all trace entries recorded on this trigger, in the order they were added. Returns an empty list by default.
      Returns:
      recorded contributions, or an empty list if tracing is not supported
